'''rangono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khananda|khananda]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ng-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khananda|khananda]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rangono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rængeneth|rængeneth]] || [[word:rængenej|rængenej]] || [[word:rængenesh|rængenesh]] || [[word:rængene|rængene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rangongonoth|rangongonoth]] || [[word:rangongonoj|rangongonoj]] || [[word:rangongonosh|rangongonosh]] || [[word:rangongono|rangongono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rangonoth|rangonoth]] || [[word:rangonoj|rangonoj]] || [[word:rangonosh|rangonosh]] || [[word:rangono|rangono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rangofnoth|rangofnoth]] || [[word:rangofnoj|rangofnoj]] || [[word:rangofnosh|rangofnosh]] || [[word:rangofnof|rangofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rangonotho|rangonotho]] || [[word:rangonojo|rangonojo]] || [[word:rangonosho|rangonosho]] || [[word:rangonoko|rangonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rangonoth|rangonoth]] || [[word:rangonoj|rangonoj]] || [[word:rangonosh|rangonosh]] || [[word:rangono|rangono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rangonothol|rangonothol]] || [[word:rangonojol|rangonojol]] || [[word:rangonoshol|rangonoshol]] || [[word:rangonokol|rangonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rangonothotho|rangonothotho]] || [[word:rangonojojo|rangonojojo]] || [[word:rangonoshosho|rangonoshosho]] || [[word:rangonoko|rangonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rangonothon|rangonothon]] || [[word:rangonojon|rangonojon]] || [[word:rangonoshon|rangonoshon]] || [[word:rangonokon|rangonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rangonothoro|rangonothoro]] || [[word:rangonojoro|rangonojoro]] || [[word:rangonoshoro|rangonoshoro]] || [[word:rangonokoro|rangonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
